sqlMap.select: SELECT id, cardnumber, personname, houseplace, extra1, extra2, insert_time FROM p_fxpersonnel_add_t WHERE (extra2 IS NULL OR extra2 != 'added' OR extra2 = 'null') ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p_personnel_t WHERE cardnumber = #value# AND validflag > 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_personnel_t (cardnumber, personname, houseplace, zslabel1, validflag, addtime, isrisk) VALUES ('$cardnumber$', '$personname$', '$houseplace$', '2046', 1, NOW(), 1)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_fxpersonnel_add_t SET extra2 = 'added' WHERE id = #value#
